description: Write a Python script that reads requirements.txt and lists installed packages
instructions: Create a file called check_deps.py that reads requirements.txt, installs the packages using pip, then prints each package name and its installed version. Use importlib.metadata to get versions. Print one line per package in the format: 'package==version'.

files.README.md:
# Dependency Checker

Install deps from requirements.txt and verify they are available.

checks.name: script runs without error
checks.command: cd /workspace && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python3 check_deps.py
